extraction.one_line_summary: KÄMNA Lennard won Stage 16 to Villard-de-Lans from a breakaway, while ROGLIČ Primož maintained 40 seconds over POGAČAR Tadej after late UAE acceleration tested Jumbo-Visma.
tactical_patterns: TRENTIN Matteo scored intermediate sprint points to pressure SAGAN Peter when BENNETT Sam missed the climb split early.
UAE Team Emirates attacked with DE LA CRUZ David late to isolate ROGLIČ, temporarily forcing Jumbo-Visma to chase defensively.
LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel attacked final hundreds of meters specifically targeting podium time gaps, not stage win.
QUINTANA Nairo cracked again on final climb, losing contact multiple times revealing complete collapse in third week form.

rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: delivered first Tour stage win from breakaway despite Sunweb having three riders in front group
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: missed intermediate sprint split on category four climb, failed basic tactic of following SAGAN wheel
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: opportunistically scored 20 sprint points when favorites split, closing to 15 points behind SAGAN in green jersey
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: cracked multiple times on final climb, dropped completely and lost positions to DUMOULIN Tom
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: sat struggling on back of yellow jersey group before recovering to gain time on QUINTANA
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: tactically attacked final meters specifically hunting podium time gaps rather than stage placing
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: hanging tough in yellow jersey group, maintaining sixth overall with only ELISSONDE Kenny remaining as teammate
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: UAE acceleration with DE LA CRUZ briefly put Jumbo-Visma defensive before KUSS Sepp controlled
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: stuck to POGAČAR wheel on every attack but required team to respond when UAE struck first
